[[Category:Psychology]]
Group dynamics can turn for the worse even if nobody in the group is [[Antisociality and Prosociality|antisocial]] or only a small portion is.

This is due to emergent group behaviors. For example [[The Holocaust]] was an example of such an emergent behavior

[[Alienation]] is a plague highly linked to collective evil, and [[Sangha Democracy]] and [[The Pride]] are intended as means to fight it

== My personal social skills ==
I’m good at making first impressions

But I can’t be accepted by groups. I feel I’m basically doomed to failure in this regard. Although this is specifically a North American thing

I can develop and maintain long term friendships with people. If I somehow sidestep the group part then I’m good

I'm seemingly managing to sidestep school socializing altogether and meeting people irl in different circumstances
[[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Theories]]
[[Category:Organizational behavior‏‎]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
